## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest` (or `pytest -x` to stop on first failure)

- [ ] No active reconnaissance, no counterattacks — purely defensive
- [ ] If touching C0 (crypto) or C1 (forensic log): explain why in the PR description
- [ ] If adding a dependency: justify it (AEGIS has zero optional deps by design)
